decision.summary: No existing position to manage and no valid new BTC market entry is available.
decision.rationale: Recent transcripts and summaries keep the thesis intact: Beecthor still expects a final sweep near 67.9k-68.4k and then a corrective rebound toward 73.26k-74.04k, while macro bias remains bearish with at least one lower low still expected. Binance spot at 68950.1 is near that support/rebound zone, but Polymarket shows no open BTC positions and no active BTC markets or probabilities, so the playbook’s nearest-strike-first, minimum-probability, and conservative market-selection rules cannot justify any trade.
